mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, activity_id, goods_no, store_no, goods_amount, seckill_price, total_price, order_state, payment_type, create_time
mapper.insert:
insert into seckill_order
id,
order_no,
user_id,
activity_id,
goods_no,
store_no,
goods_amount,
seckill_price,
total_price,
order_state,
payment_type,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update seckill_order
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_amount = #{goodsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_state = #{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment_type = #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update seckill_order set order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_amount = #{goodsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, order_state = #{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, payment_type = #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
